title: The Disputed Claim (Healthcare & Insurance)
description: A high-stakes resolution between General Hospital and SecureHealth Insurance regarding patient John Smith.

tasks.title: Data Retrieval (Healthcare)
tasks.description: Fetch authorization AUTH-99 from the Healthcare Provider's API.
tasks.expected_outcome: Record found with code AUTH-99, status 'Pending'.

tasks.title: Discrepancy Analysis (Insurance)
tasks.description: Query the Insurance Payer's database for AUTH-99.
tasks.expected_outcome: Record shows AUTH-99 is marked as 'Denied' due to 'Incomplete Documentation'.

tasks.title: Conflict Resolution
tasks.description: Reconcile the records and propose a 'Correction Request' to the Insurance system.
tasks.expected_outcome: Correction submitted, status updated to 'Under Review'.

tasks.title: Patient Transparency
tasks.description: Notify John Smith (john.smith@example.com) about the current status and the expected resolution timeline.
tasks.expected_outcome: Email sent to patient explaining the administrative correction.
